emails.subject: FW: Edison MOU
emails.body: FW: Edison MOU Check out page 16 and the $12.3 B of open position that DWR is showing as on the hook for in 2003 thur 2004. This flies in the face of the MOU which states that the open short reverts to Edison after 12/31/02. Half baked, I'd say.
